creator: amdmi3@amdmi3.ru
text:
> Synopsis: UPDATE net-im/centerim
Seems like plist is incorrect.

http://people.freebsd.org/~amdmi3/centerim-4.22.6.log

I suggest to add an option and either not install python script or
run-depend on python. Installing this script to %%EXAMPLESDIR%%
instead of bin/ is also an option.

-- 
Dmitry Marakasov   .   55B5 0596 FF1E 8D84 5F56  9510 D35A 80DD F9D2 F77D
